_note: SnapCal 'Eat Out' elite feature data. Macros sourced from official chain nutrition info (2025-2026) cross-checked vs Nutritionix. Goal keys match the app: lose_weight | maintain | build_muscle (glp1 users => use lose_weight picks, smallest portions).

restaurants.verdict: Doable with intention — anchor on a lean protein (Egg White Delight, plain Egg McMuffin, McDouble, Quarter Pounder) and swap fries for fruit or a salad.

lose_weight.name: Egg White Delight McMuffin
lose_weight.why: Lowest-cal hot breakfast with real protein; egg whites + lean Canadian bacon keep you full under 300 cal.

lose_weight.name: 6-pc Chicken McNuggets (no fries, sauce on side)
lose_weight.why: Portion-controlled protein you can eat in the car; skip fries and a large soda.

maintain.name: Egg McMuffin
maintain.why: The classic balanced breakfast: whole egg, Canadian bacon, English muffin — no sausage fat bomb.

maintain.name: McDouble (no extra cheese)
maintain.why: High protein-per-calorie; a single McDouble is a reasonable meal anchor.

build_muscle.name: Quarter Pounder with Cheese
build_muscle.why: 30g protein in one sandwich — an efficient muscle-building anchor.

build_muscle.name: 2 Egg McMuffins
build_muscle.why: 34g protein with balanced carbs for a big breakfast that builds without excess fat.

smart_swaps.get: Egg White Delight McMuffin (260 cal)
McDouble (400 cal)
smart_swaps.saves: -190 cal, similar protein, no special-sauce fat

smart_swaps.get: Apple Slices + 6-pc McNuggets (265 cal)

order_hacks: Choose Egg White Delight or a plain Egg McMuffin over anything with sausage — sausage adds ~15g fat for little extra protein.
Swap fries for Apple Slices or a side salad to cut 200+ calories.
Ask for nugget sauce on the side and dip light — sauces add 45-90 cal each.
Pick Diet soda, unsweetened iced tea, or water to avoid 150-300 liquid calories.

restaurants.verdict: One of the easiest chains to eat healthy — default to Grilled Nuggets or the Egg White Grill for elite protein-per-calorie.

lose_weight.name: Grilled Nuggets, 8-count (sauce on side)
lose_weight.why: 25g protein for 130 cal with near-zero carbs/fat — the best fat-loss order in fast food.

lose_weight.name: Egg White Grill
lose_weight.why: 27g protein for 300 cal at breakfast — grilled chicken, egg whites, cheese on a multigrain muffin.

maintain.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
maintain.why: A genuinely balanced sandwich — grilled breast on a multigrain bun, 28g protein under 400 cal.

maintain.name: Grilled Nuggets 12-count + Side Salad
maintain.why: Mix-and-match protein box: 40g protein with veggies, easy to keep light.

build_muscle.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich + Grilled Nuggets 8-count
build_muscle.why: Stacks two grilled items for 53g protein with moderate fat — an ideal lean-bulk meal.

build_muscle.name: Cool Wrap + Grilled Nuggets 8-count
build_muscle.why: A huge 67g protein hit with controlled fat — elite protein-per-calorie.

smart_swaps.get: Egg White Grill (300 cal)
Grilled Chicken Sandwich (390 cal)
8-ct Grilled Nuggets (130 cal)

order_hacks: Always choose Grilled Nuggets over fried — same protein, roughly half the calories.
Order the Egg White Grill instead of any biscuit at breakfast.
Get dressings on the side — creamy ones (Avocado Lime Ranch) add 300+ calories.
Swap waffle fries for a Side Salad, Fruit Cup, or Superfood Side.

restaurants.verdict: Easy to navigate — build meals around the Grilled Chicken Sandwich and a Small Chili: high protein, high fiber, low fat.

lose_weight.name: Small Chili
lose_weight.why: High-protein, high-fiber bean-and-beef bowl that's genuinely filling for 240 cal.

lose_weight.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich (no mayo)
lose_weight.why: Lean grilled breast, 34g protein under 350 cal; dropping the sauce shaves fat with no protein loss.

maintain.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich
maintain.why: One of the best maintenance sandwiches in fast food — grilled breast, lettuce, tomato.

maintain.name: Small Chili + Side Caesar Salad (light dressing)
maintain.why: Protein, fiber, and greens combine into a complete, satisfying meal.

build_muscle.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich + Small Chili
build_muscle.why: 51g protein with quality carbs and fiber, low fat — an excellent lean-bulk combo.

build_muscle.name: Dave's Double
build_muscle.why: Two fresh-beef patties deliver 47g protein for a heavy training-day refuel.

smart_swaps.get: Dave's Single (480 cal)
Grilled Chicken Sandwich (350 cal)
Grilled Chicken Sandwich + Small Chili (590 cal)

order_hacks: Order grilled, not breaded/crispy or spicy — saves ~140 cal and 11g fat.
Add a Small Chili — the cheapest, highest-fiber protein add-on on the menu.
Skip mayo/herb sauce on the grilled sandwich to cut ~100 cal of pure fat.
Choose a plain baked potato or side salad instead of fries.

restaurants.verdict: Order grilled and say 'no mayo' — the Tendergrill Garden Salad (no dressing) is 320 cal for 36g protein.

lose_weight.name: Garden Grilled Chicken Salad (no dressing)
lose_weight.why: Highest protein-to-calorie on the menu; 36g protein and fiber-rich veggies. Light vinaigrette on the side.

lose_weight.name: Whopper Jr., no mayo
lose_weight.why: Dropping mayo cuts ~70 cal/8g fat; flame-grilled beef in a small footprint.

maintain.name: Whopper Jr. (as served)
maintain.why: A satisfying flame-grilled burger that fits an everyday budget without a combo blowing it out.

maintain.name: Double Cheeseburger
maintain.why: Two patties give 22g protein in a compact, portion-controlled package.

build_muscle.name: Garden Grilled Chicken Salad + Whopper Jr., no mayo
build_muscle.why: Stacks two leaner items to clear ~50g protein with moderate calories.

build_muscle.name: Double Cheeseburger + grilled chicken side
build_muscle.why: High protein and enough calories to support training; pair with water.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Whopper w/ cheese + medium fries (~1010 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Whopper Jr. no mayo + Garden Grilled Chicken Salad (~560 cal)
BK Royal Crispy Chicken, no mayo + side salad (~420 cal)
Double Cheeseburger + grilled chicken salad (~720 cal)

order_hacks: Say 'no mayo' on any burger or chicken sandwich — cuts ~70-90 cal and 8-10g fat per item.
Order grilled (Tendergrill / Royal Grilled), not crispy/fried — drops ~150-200 cal.
Get the Whopper Jr. instead of the full Whopper — same taste, ~half the calories.
Ask for dressing on the side and use half — BK dressings add 150-260 cal.

restaurants.verdict: One of the easiest to eat lean thanks to 'Fresco style' — a Power Menu Bowl - Chicken, no rice, Fresco is 25g protein around 260 cal.

lose_weight.name: Power Menu Bowl - Chicken, no rice, Fresco style
lose_weight.why: Dropping rice and going Fresco makes a high-protein, high-fiber, low-cal meal of beans, chicken, lettuce, pico.

lose_weight.name: Chicken Soft Taco, Fresco style (order two)
lose_weight.why: Fresco swap (pico for cheese/sauce) makes one of the leanest 11g-protein bites in fast food.

maintain.name: Cantina Chicken Bowl (as served)
maintain.why: Slow-roasted chicken, beans, rice, guac and pico — a balanced 33g-protein bowl that eats like a full meal.

maintain.name: 2 Chicken Soft Tacos, Fresco style
maintain.why: 22g protein for ~300 cal — leaves room for a side and still lands balanced.

build_muscle.name: Cantina Chicken Bowl + extra chicken
build_muscle.why: Double chicken pushes protein near 45g with enough carbs to refuel.

build_muscle.name: Power Menu Bowl - Chicken, extra chicken
build_muscle.why: High protein plus rice and beans for the carbs your muscles want after training.

smart_swaps.get: Power Menu Bowl - Chicken, no rice, Fresco (~260 cal)
Power Menu Bowl - Chicken, Fresco (~430 cal)
Cantina Chicken Bowl + extra chicken (~600 cal)

order_hacks: Say 'Fresco style' — swaps cheese/creamy sauces for fresh pico, cutting ~25% of the calories at no charge.
Order any bowl 'no rice, add black beans' to trade refined carbs for fiber and protein.
Pick chicken or steak over seasoned beef — leaner with less saturated fat.
Build from Power Menu / Cantina bowls, not the combo deals.

restaurants.verdict: Easiest to eat clean because you control every ingredient — wheat bread, double lean meat, no cheese, every veggie.

lose_weight.name: 6" Oven Roasted Turkey on wheat, no cheese, loaded veggies
lose_weight.why: Only 3g fat and 20g protein; veggies add volume so it eats bigger than its calories.

lose_weight.name: 6" Rotisserie-Style Chicken on wheat, no cheese, loaded veggies
lose_weight.why: Real pulled chicken, 23g protein for ~300 cal — high satiety with minimal fat.

maintain.name: 6" Subway Club on wheat, no cheese, mustard
maintain.why: Turkey, ham and roast beef stack 27g protein into a balanced everyday sub.

maintain.name: 6" Black Forest Ham on wheat, no cheese, loaded veggies
maintain.why: Lean and balanced; leaves calorie room for fruit or yogurt on the side.

build_muscle.name: Footlong Oven Roasted Turkey on wheat, double meat, no cheese
build_muscle.why: ~40g protein with the carbs to refuel and almost no fat — an excellent training meal.

build_muscle.name: Footlong Rotisserie-Style Chicken on wheat, double meat, veggies
build_muscle.why: ~48g protein from real chicken plus ample carbs.

smart_swaps.get: 6" Oven Roasted Turkey on wheat, no cheese, loaded veggies (~260 cal)
6" Rotisserie-Style Chicken on wheat, no cheese, mustard (~300 cal)
Footlong Oven Roasted Turkey, double meat, no cheese (~520 cal)

order_hacks: Choose 9-grain wheat over Italian/white or cheesy breads — more fiber, less baked-in fat.
Skip cheese and pick mustard, vinegar, or light mayo — saves ~100-200 cal.
'Double the meat' to turn any sub into a 35-50g-protein meal.
Load every free veggie — fiber and volume for near-zero calories.

restaurants.verdict: Easy if you order black coffee, an Americano, or a nonfat/Skinny latte with an egg-white sandwich or protein box — treat Frappuccinos as dessert.

lose_weight.name: Turkey Bacon, Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich
lose_weight.why: Highest protein-per-calorie hot breakfast sandwich; lean and filling.

lose_weight.name: Grande Skinny Vanilla Latte (sugar-free, nonfat)
lose_weight.why: Tastes like a treat but 12g protein, zero fat, low sugar.

maintain.name: Spinach, Feta & Egg White Wrap
maintain.why: Balanced macros with veggies and fiber — a real, satisfying breakfast.

maintain.name: Grande Caffe Latte with nonfat milk
maintain.why: Most protein for the calories of any milk latte; no added sugar.

build_muscle.name: Eggs & Cheddar Protein Box
build_muscle.why: A complete mini-meal — highest single-item protein to support muscle growth.

build_muscle.name: Bacon & Gruyere Egg Bites (2-pack) + nonfat latte
build_muscle.why: Stacks egg bites with a latte for 30g+ protein, lower carb.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Venti Caramel Frappuccino w/ whip (470 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Grande Iced Caramel Macchiato, nonfat (210 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Venti Caramel Frappuccino w/ whip (470 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Grande Iced Brown Sugar Oatmilk Shaken Espresso (120 cal)
Turkey Bacon, Cheddar & Egg White Sandwich (230 cal)

order_hacks: Sub nonfat milk in any latte to save ~60 cal with no protein loss.
Say 'Skinny' = sugar-free syrup + nonfat milk + no whip (vanilla latte = 120 cal, 12g protein).
Halve the syrup pumps — a Grande defaults to ~4 pumps (~80 cal of sugar).
Order Cold Brew (5 cal) or an Americano (15 cal) instead of a Frappuccino (470 cal).

restaurants.verdict: A lean high-protein stop or a 700-cal dessert depending entirely on the drink — order coffee black or 'skinny' with an English-muffin or wrap sandwich.

lose_weight.name: Wake-Up Wrap, Turkey Sausage, Egg & Cheese
lose_weight.why: Hot, handheld and protein-dense for the calories — a leaner meat choice.

lose_weight.name: Medium Iced Macchiato with skim (plain/sugar-free)
lose_weight.why: Espresso-forward and satisfying with almost no sugar and a little protein.

maintain.name: Bacon, Egg & Cheese on English Muffin
maintain.why: Balanced macros in a real meal without the croissant's fat overload.

maintain.name: Medium Iced Latte with oatmilk (plain)
maintain.why: Creamy and low-sugar real coffee, a balanced everyday choice.

build_muscle.name: Sourdough Breakfast Sandwich
build_muscle.why: Highest protein on the menu; pair with black coffee to keep it clean.

build_muscle.name: Bacon, Egg & Cheese English Muffin + Snackin' Bacon
build_muscle.why: Stacks 28g protein across two items without a 700-cal single order.

smart_swaps.get: Medium Iced Coffee w/ skim + sugar-free flavor (30 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Sausage, Egg & Cheese on Croissant (710 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Sausage, Egg & Cheese on English Muffin (550 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Brown Sugar Cream Cold Brew (180 cal, 35g sugar)
smart_swaps.get: Cold Brew black with a splash of cream (70 cal)

order_hacks: Order it black or with a splash of milk — coffee/cold brew is 5-15 cal; cream swirls blow it up.
Build the 'skinny': sugar-free swirl + skim/almond/oatmilk instead of sugar syrup.
Cut or halve the flavor pumps — a medium defaults to ~4.
Choose Cold Brew over Frozen Coffee for the same craving (~5 cal vs ~610 cal).

restaurants.verdict: Lean or quietly 1,000+ calories on two switches — pick a broth-based soup or a chicken grain/Cobb bowl and make every drink an unsweetened tea or coffee.

lose_weight.name: Green Goddess Cobb with Chicken (Half) + Cup Ten Vegetable Soup
lose_weight.why: Huge volume and 23g protein for the calories — very high fullness.

lose_weight.name: Cup Chicken Noodle Soup + Greek Yogurt with Mixed Berries Parfait
lose_weight.why: Warm, protein-rich and satisfying combo well under 400 cal.

maintain.name: Bacon Turkey Bravo (Half) + Cup Ten Vegetable Soup
maintain.why: Classic balanced You-Pick-Two with strong protein and added veg volume.

maintain.name: Mediterranean Bowl with Chicken
maintain.why: Whole grains, vegetables and lean protein in a balanced, quality bowl.

build_muscle.name: Teriyaki Chicken & Broccoli Bowl
build_muscle.why: The single best protein-to-calorie bowl on the menu for muscle building.

build_muscle.name: Bacon Turkey Bravo (Whole) + Cup Chicken Noodle Soup
build_muscle.why: Top whole-meal protein total on the menu to drive recovery.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Mango Yuzu Charged Lemonade (350 cal, 86g sugar)
smart_swaps.get: Unsweetened Iced Black Tea or Plum Ginger Hibiscus (0-5 cal)
Ten Vegetable Soup (Bowl, 100 cal)
Bacon Turkey Bravo (Whole, 640 cal)

order_hacks: Order any lemonade or tea unsweetened (or the 0-cal Plum Ginger Hibiscus) — sweetened/Charged drinks hide 160-350 cal each.
Build a You-Pick-Two as a Half + a broth-based soup (Ten Vegetable, Chicken Noodle) not Broccoli Cheddar.
Get creamy dressings on the side and use half — 200-400 cal live there.
Add a 'double chicken' protein add-on (~+22g protein) instead of bread or a smoothie.

restaurants.verdict: Easy if you build a bowl — a double-chicken bowl with beans, fajita veggies and salsa (skip tortilla/queso/sour cream) is 80g+ protein under 750 cal.

lose_weight.name: Chicken bowl: half brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, romaine
lose_weight.why: Double-fiber beans + veggies + 45g protein for high fullness at low calories.

lose_weight.name: Chicken salad: greens, black beans, fajita veggies, chili-corn salsa, no rice/dressing
lose_weight.why: Skipping rice drops carbs hard; greens + beans + chicken keep you full under 400 cal.

maintain.name: Chicken bowl: brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, salsa, cheese, romaine
maintain.why: Balanced whole-grain + lean protein + veggies; cheese adds flavor without queso's fat load.

maintain.name: Steak bowl: brown rice, pinto beans, chili-corn salsa, fajita veggies, romaine
maintain.why: Lean steak, slow carbs, no added dairy fat — a quality balanced plate.

build_muscle.name: Double chicken bowl: brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, salsa, cheese
build_muscle.why: Double chicken pushes 80g+ protein with adequate carbs to refuel.

build_muscle.name: Steak + chicken bowl: brown rice, pinto beans, fajita veggies, salsa, cheese
build_muscle.why: Mixed lean proteins for ~65g protein with whole-grain carbs.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Chicken burrito w/ white rice, cheese, sour cream, guac (~1100 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Chicken bowl: brown rice, black beans, veggies, salsa, no tortilla/sour cream (~565 cal)
Skip chips; add fajita veggies + extra salsa (~45 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Single chicken bowl, white rice, queso, sour cream (~720 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Double chicken bowl, brown rice, veggies, salsa, cheese (~745 cal)

order_hacks: Bowl not burrito — the flour tortilla alone is 320 cal and 50g carbs.
Double the chicken (+180 cal for +32g protein) — best protein-per-calorie move on the menu.
Half rice or no rice; rice is the silent calorie driver. Fajita veggies are nearly free (20 cal).
Salsa instead of sour cream (110 cal) or queso (120 cal); want guac? Get it instead of queso, not on top.

restaurants.verdict: Healthy is one swap away — Grilled Teriyaki Chicken (or String Bean Chicken) over Super Greens turns a 1000-cal combo into a 430-cal, 40g-protein meal.

lose_weight.name: Grilled Teriyaki Chicken over Super Greens (no rice)
lose_weight.why: Lean grilled protein on a veggie base — the single best fat-loss order here.

lose_weight.name: String Bean Chicken Breast over Super Greens
lose_weight.why: Wok-light entree + greens, under 350 cal with real vegetable volume.

maintain.name: Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Super Greens + half white rice
maintain.why: Balanced lean protein, veggies and a controlled carb scoop.

maintain.name: Black Pepper Angus Steak + Super Greens + half rice
maintain.why: Premium lean steak, greens, and a modest carb portion for quality balance.

build_muscle.name: Double Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + white rice
build_muscle.why: Two lean entrees push 70g+ protein with rice carbs to refuel.

build_muscle.name: Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Broccoli Beef + white rice
build_muscle.why: Two-entree plate stacks lean protein with moderate fat and solid carbs.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Orange Chicken + Chow Mein plate (~1000 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Grilled Teriyaki Chicken + Super Greens (~430 cal)
Super Greens side (90 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Bigger Plate: Orange Chicken x2 + fried rice (~1500 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Bigger Plate: Grilled Teriyaki x2 + Broccoli Beef + white rice (~1000 cal)

order_hacks: Sub Super Greens (90 cal) for chow mein (510) or fried rice (520) — the biggest single save.
Grilled Teriyaki Chicken or String Bean Chicken are leanest; skip Orange/Sesame/Beijing (battered + glazed).
Ask for sauce on the side — Orange Chicken's calories are mostly the glaze.
Half-and-half base: half greens, half rice cuts ~210 cal vs a full rice scoop.

restaurants.verdict: Dodge the fried-and-breaded defaults — go Kentucky Grilled breast with green beans (skip the biscuit) for ~235 cal and 40g protein.

lose_weight.name: Kentucky Grilled Chicken breast + green beans
lose_weight.why: Skinless grilled breast is 38g protein for 210 cal; green beans add volume for ~25 cal.

lose_weight.name: 2pc Grilled (breast + thigh) + green beans
lose_weight.why: High protein, minimal carbs; green beans over coleslaw saves ~145 cal.

maintain.name: Kentucky Grilled breast + mashed potatoes w/ gravy + green beans
maintain.why: Lean grilled protein with a controlled starch and a veggie side.

maintain.name: 2pc Grilled (breast + drumstick) + corn on the cob
maintain.why: High protein with a whole-food carb side; corn beats biscuit by ~110 cal.

build_muscle.name: 3pc Kentucky Grilled + mashed potatoes w/ gravy
build_muscle.why: 66g protein from grilled pieces plus a carb side, without deep-fried breading.

build_muscle.name: 2 Grilled breasts + corn on the cob + green beans
build_muscle.why: Two breasts deliver ~80g protein; vegetable sides keep fat controlled.

smart_swaps.get: 2pc Kentucky Grilled + green beans (~385 cal)
Green beans side (25 cal)
2 Grilled breasts + green beans + mashed potatoes (~445 cal)

order_hacks: Order Kentucky Grilled when available — a grilled breast saves ~110 cal and most of the fat vs Original Recipe.
If only fried, remove the skin/breading from the breast to cut significant fat.
Skip the biscuit (180 cal) — swap for green beans or corn.
Green beans (25 cal) over coleslaw (170 cal) or mac & cheese.

restaurants.verdict: Ignore the fried menu — blackened tenders are a cheat code (26g protein, 170 cal per 3pc), so build any plate around them and skip the biscuit.

lose_weight.name: Blackened Chicken Tenders 3pc + Louisiana hot sauce
lose_weight.why: The highest-protein, lowest-calorie item — blackened tenders skip the fried breading entirely.

lose_weight.name: Blackened Chicken Tenders 3pc + Green Beans
lose_weight.why: Adds a near-zero-calorie veggie for volume; best all-around weight-loss plate here.

maintain.name: Blackened Tenders 5pc + Mashed Potatoes w/ Cajun Gravy
maintain.why: High protein, lower fat than most Popeyes plates, with a comforting starch side.

maintain.name: Blackened Tenders 5pc + Red Beans & Rice
maintain.why: 50g protein with a satisfying Cajun side, skipping the fried grease.

build_muscle.name: Blackened Tenders 5pc + Red Beans & Rice + Green Beans
build_muscle.why: 51g protein plus quality carbs from beans and rice, with fiber from two sides.

build_muscle.name: Blackened Tenders 8pc + Red Beans & Rice
build_muscle.why: 74g protein in one order without the breading bloat.

smart_swaps.get: 3pc Blackened Tenders + Green Beans (205 cal)
Blackened Tenders 5pc + Louisiana hot sauce (290 cal)
8pc Blackened Tenders + Red Beans & Rice (690 cal)

order_hacks: Order blackened tenders, NOT fried/handcrafted — same chicken, no breading, ~270 fewer cal per 3pc.
Skip the biscuit — ~250 cal of almost pure butter and refined flour.
Pick Green Beans or Red Beans & Rice over Cajun Fries or mac & cheese.
Use Louisiana hot sauce instead of creamy/honey-mustard dips (~0 cal vs 100-150 per cup).

restaurants.verdict: Hardest to eat light (huge portions, ~1300-cal fries) — a Little Bunless burger loaded with free veggies and zero fries is a clean 220-290 cal high-protein meal.

lose_weight.name: Little Bunless Hamburger (lettuce wrap) + all free veggies
lose_weight.why: Single-patty bunless drops ~320 cal of bun; pile on every free veggie for volume and fiber.

lose_weight.name: Little Bunless Cheeseburger + veggies
lose_weight.why: Low-carb, 20g protein, no bun bloat — cheese without the 600+ cal full cheeseburger.

maintain.name: Little Hamburger (single patty, bun) + all the veggies
maintain.why: A real burger that fits a maintenance day IF you skip fries; free veggies add bulk.

maintain.name: Little Bunless Cheeseburger + veggies
maintain.why: 20g protein, no bun — a solid pick when you want cheese without the full burger.

build_muscle.name: Bunless Cheeseburger (two patties, lettuce wrap) + veggies
build_muscle.why: 40g protein, near-zero carbs — a muscle-building powerhouse without the fries trap.

build_muscle.name: Little Bacon Burger (single patty, bun) + veggies
build_muscle.why: 30g protein with carbs for training fuel; add the bun back since you've earned the calories.

smart_swaps.get: Little Bunless Cheeseburger + veggies, skip fries (290 cal)
Little Fries shared, or add a second bunless patty (~250-300 cal)
Bunless Cheeseburger (2 patty) + water + veggies (580 cal)

order_hacks: Order a 'Little' (single patty) — standard burgers are DOUBLE patties; 'Little' nearly halves the calories.
Go bunless / lettuce wrap to cut ~320 cal and ~39g refined carbs.
Skip the fries or split ONE Little fry — a regular fry is ~1300 cal alone.
Load every free veggie; use mustard/ketchup/hot sauce instead of mayo to save ~100-150 cal.

restaurants.verdict: Very easy — the 'Sub in a Tub' (no bread) plus a lean turkey or roast beef Mike's Way with oil light is a 330-cal, 29g-protein meal.

lose_weight.name: #7 Turkey & Provolone Sub in a Tub, Mike's Way (no bread, oil light)
lose_weight.why: Ditches the bread for a high-protein chopped salad; lean turkey delivers ~29g protein.

lose_weight.name: #43 Chipotle Chicken or #17 Chicken Philly in a Tub (no bread)
lose_weight.why: Grilled chicken in a tub is lean, high-protein, and very filling with the veggies.

maintain.name: Mini #7 Turkey & Provolone, Mike's Way, on wheat
maintain.why: A portion-controlled real sandwich — balanced macros, whole-grain carbs, Mike's Way veggies.

maintain.name: Regular #7 Turkey & Provolone in a Tub, Mike's Way (oil light)
maintain.why: Full-size protein hit without bread; ask for oil light. Low-carb, very satisfying.

build_muscle.name: Regular #6 Roast Beef & Provolone, Mike's Way, on wheat
build_muscle.why: Lean top-round roast beef gives ~48g protein with quality carbs to fuel training.

build_muscle.name: Regular #7 Turkey & Provolone, Mike's Way, on wheat (oil light)
build_muscle.why: 44g protein in one sub plus carbs for recovery; oil light trims fat.

smart_swaps.instead_of: Regular #7 Turkey on white, Mike's Way (780 cal)
smart_swaps.get: #7 Turkey Sub in a Tub, oil light (330 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Regular #13 Original Italian, Mike's Way (~1000+ cal)
smart_swaps.get: Mini #7 Turkey on wheat, Mike's Way (460 cal)

smart_swaps.instead_of: Cold sub + chips + cookie combo (~1300 cal)
smart_swaps.get: Regular #6 Roast Beef on wheat, no chips (770 cal)

order_hacks: Order it as a 'Sub in a Tub' — same fillings, no bread; drops ~250-300 cal and 45-55g carbs.
Get 'Mike's Way' but ask for the OIL LIGHT — the oil is the biggest hidden fat.
Choose lean proteins: turkey (#7) or top-round roast beef (#6) over fattier Italian/cold cuts.
Pick the Mini or 'in a tub' over the Giant (can top 1,400+ cal); skip the chips-and-cookie upsell.
